span.p:
Best-effort batch / Job
eviction on contention is fine

span.p:
Do you have observed usage
kubectl top / VPA recommendation?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Measure first: run in staging/prod with
generous limits + VPA in recommendation mode
updateMode Off, then come back

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Guaranteed QoS:
requests == limits for BOTH cpu and memory
last to be evicted

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Burstable QoS:
memory request == limit ALWAYS
cpu request set, cpu limit often omitted to allow burst

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Still set a memory LIMIT
no requests = BestEffort = first evicted

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Memory is incompressible:
a memory LIMIT is never optional

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Size request from p50-p90 observed usage,
limit with headroom over peak
